description.value: Saffron Ventures is an industrial supermarket based in Ahmedabad, offering a comprehensive range of high-quality power tools and equipment. They specialize in products like Bosch Rotary Hammers GBH 185-LI, Circular Saws GKS 185 Li, Miter Saw Machines, Hand Sanding Sheets, and Bosch Magnetic Drilling Machines, catering to diverse industrial needs.

address.value: Plot Number 1 Marriot Industrial Park New 100 Feet Road, Kathwada, Indore - Ahmedabad Highway, Bhuvaladi
